---
title: "Final Project — Static Plots"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import geopandas as gpd
import altair as alt
from IPython.display import display
import folium
from folium.features import GeoJsonTooltip
from branca.colormap import linear
from branca.element import MacroElement
from jinja2 import Template
from branca.colormap import LinearColormap
import matplotlib.cm as cm
import matplotlib.colors as mcolors
```



```{python}
# ===================================================
# 0) Paths & shared utilities  (RELATIVE PATHS)
# ===================================================

def ensure_exists(path: Path, what: str) -> None:
    if not path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"[Missing {what}] Cannot find: {path}")


def ensure_cols(df: pd.DataFrame, required: list[str], where: str) -> None:
    missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise ValueError(f"[{where}] Missing required columns: {missing}")


def clean_key(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    return s.astype(str).str.strip()


def to_numeric_inplace(df: pd.DataFrame, cols: list[str]) -> None:
    for c in cols:
        if c in df.columns:
            df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce")


def safe_log_income(df: pd.DataFrame, income_col: str = "median_income_proxy") -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = df.copy()
    if income_col not in df.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"Income column '{income_col}' not found.")
    df[income_col] = pd.to_numeric(df[income_col], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=[income_col])
    df = df[df[income_col] > 0]
    df["log_income"] = np.log(df[income_col])
    return df


def save_fig(fig: plt.Figure, outdir: Path, filename: str, dpi: int = 200) -> Path:
    outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out = outdir / filename
    fig.savefig(out, dpi=dpi, bbox_inches="tight")
    return out


# ---- RELATIVE repo root anchored at code/ ----
REPO = Path("..")

if not (REPO / "data").is_dir() or not (REPO / "code").is_dir():
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "Expected structure: ../data and ../code (run this QMD from code/)."
    )

RAW_NTA_SHP = REPO / "data" / "raw-data" / "nta_2020" / "nta_2020.shp"
DERIVED = REPO / "data" / "derived-data"
OUTDIR = REPO / "figures"

INCOME_CSV = DERIVED / "nta_income_households_2024.csv"
SUMMARY_CSV = DERIVED / "nta_inspection_summary.csv"            
SUMMARY_CSV_YEAR = DERIVED / "nta_inspection_summary_by_year.csv"
INSP_PARQUET = DERIVED / "inspections_with_nta_income.parquet"

print("REPO         =", REPO)
print("RAW_NTA_SHP  =", RAW_NTA_SHP)
print("INCOME_CSV   =", INCOME_CSV)
print("SUMMARY_CSV  =", SUMMARY_CSV)
print("SUMMARY_CSV_YEAR =", SUMMARY_CSV_YEAR)
print("INSP_PARQUET =", INSP_PARQUET)
print("OUTDIR       =", OUTDIR)
```



```{python}
# ===========================
# 1) Load NTA geometry
# ===========================

ensure_exists(RAW_NTA_SHP, "NTA shapefile")
nta_gdf = gpd.read_file(RAW_NTA_SHP)

NTA_CODE_COL = "nta2020"
ensure_cols(nta_gdf, [NTA_CODE_COL], "NTA shapefile")

nta_gdf = nta_gdf.copy()
nta_gdf["nta"] = clean_key(nta_gdf[NTA_CODE_COL])

nta_gdf = nta_gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)

nta_gdf.head(2)
```



```{python}
# ==================================================
# 2) One generic Altair choropleth function
# ==================================================

def plot_nta_choropleth_altair(
    gdf: gpd.GeoDataFrame,
    value_col: str,
    title: str,
    legend_title: str,
    scheme: str = "viridis",
    tooltip_format: str = ",.2f",
    output_html: str | None = None,
    width: int = 700,
    height: int = 700,
) -> alt.Chart:
    if value_col not in gdf.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"'{value_col}' not in GeoDataFrame columns.")

    geojson = gdf.__geo_interface__

    chart = (
        alt.Chart(alt.Data(values=geojson["features"]))
        .mark_geoshape(stroke="white", strokeWidth=0.3)
        .encode(
            color=alt.Color(
                f"properties.{value_col}:Q",
                title=legend_title,
                scale=alt.Scale(scheme=scheme),
            ),
            tooltip=[
                alt.Tooltip("properties.nta:N", title="NTA"),
                alt.Tooltip(
                    f"properties.{value_col}:Q",
                    title=legend_title,
                    format=tooltip_format
                ),
            ],
        )
        .properties(title=title, width=width, height=height)
        .project(type="mercator")
    )

    if output_html is not None:
        outpath = OUTDIR / output_html
        outpath.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        chart.save(str(outpath))
        print("[Saved]", outpath)

    return chart
```



```{python}
# ==============================================
# Map 1: NYC NTA Median Household Income
# ==============================================

# =========
# Helpers
# =========
def find_repo_root(start: Path | None = None) -> Path:
    start = (start or Path.cwd()).resolve()
    for p in [start] + list(start.parents):
        if (p / "data").exists() and (p / "code").exists():
            return p
    raise FileNotFoundError("Could not find project root (must contain data/ and code/).")


def _guess_borough_col(gdf: gpd.GeoDataFrame) -> str | None:
    candidates = [
        "boroname", "boro_name", "borough", "boro",
        "boro_nm", "boro_code", "borocode",
        "county", "county_name",
    ]
    cols_lower = {c.lower(): c for c in gdf.columns}
    for c in candidates:
        if c in cols_lower:
            return cols_lower[c]
    return None


def _make_viridis_colormap(vmin: float, vmax: float):
    for candidate in ["viridis", "Viridis", "Viridis_09", "viridis_09"]:
        if hasattr(linear, candidate):
            return getattr(linear, candidate).scale(vmin, vmax)
    if hasattr(linear, "YlGnBu_09"):
        return linear.YlGnBu_09.scale(vmin, vmax)
    raise AttributeError(
        "Could not find a usable colormap in branca.colormap.linear. "
        "Try upgrading branca: pip install -U branca"
    )


def _add_fixed_legend_topright(
    m: folium.Map,
    cmap,
    ticks: list[int],
    caption: str,
    box_width: int = 420,
    pad_y: int = 10,
    pad_x: int = 16,
    title_size: int = 14,
    tick_size: int = 10,
    bar_height: int = 12,
    top_offset_px: int = 20,
    right_offset_px: int = 20,
    control_pad_right_px: int = 70,
    control_pad_top_px: int = 0,
):
    vmin, vmax = float(min(ticks)), float(max(ticks))
    sample_vals = np.linspace(vmin, vmax, 12)
    colors = [cmap(float(x)) for x in sample_vals]
    gradient = ", ".join(colors)

    tick_pcts = np.linspace(0, 100, len(ticks))
    tick_html = ""
    for pct, lab in zip(tick_pcts, ticks):
        tick_html += f"""
        <div style="
            position:absolute;
            left:{pct}%;
            transform:translateX(-50%);
            top:{bar_height+4}px;
            font-size:{tick_size}px;
            color:#111;
            white-space:nowrap;
        ">{lab:,}</div>
        """

    template = f"""
    {{% macro html(this, kwargs) %}}
    <div style="
        position: fixed;
        top: {top_offset_px + control_pad_top_px}px;
        right: {right_offset_px + control_pad_right_px}px;
        z-index: 9999;

        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
        padding: {pad_y}px {pad_x}px;
        border-radius: 14px;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);

        width: {box_width}px;
        max-width: calc(100vw - {right_offset_px + control_pad_right_px + 20}px);

        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    ">
        <div style="
            font-size:{title_size}px;
            font-weight:800;
            margin-bottom:8px;
            text-align:left;
        ">{caption}</div>

        <div style="position: relative; height: {bar_height+24}px;">
            <div style="
                height: {bar_height}px;
                border-radius: 8px;
                border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
                background: linear-gradient(to right, {gradient});
            "></div>

            {tick_html}
        </div>
    </div>
    {{% endmacro %}}
    """

    macro = MacroElement()
    macro._template = Template(template)
    m.get_root().add_child(macro)


def _add_map_title(
    m: folium.Map,
    title: str = "NYC Income Map",
    subtitle: str | None = "Median Household Income by NTA",
    top_offset_px: int = 20,
):
    template = f"""
    {{% macro html(this, kwargs) %}}
    <div style="
        position: fixed;
        top: {top_offset_px}px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        z-index: 9999;

        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
        padding: 10px 20px;
        border-radius: 14px;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);

        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        text-align: center;
    ">
        <div style="
            font-size:20px;
            font-weight:800;
            margin-bottom:4px;
        ">
            {title}
        </div>
        {f'<div style="font-size:13px; color:#444;">{subtitle}</div>' if subtitle else ''}
    </div>
    {{% endmacro %}}
    """

    macro = MacroElement()
    macro._template = Template(template)
    m.get_root().add_child(macro)


# =======================================
# Map 1: NYC NTA Median Household Income
# =======================================
def make_nta_income_map_with_fixed_scale(
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    nta_shp_rel: Path = Path("data/raw-data/nta_2020/nta_2020.shp"),
    income_csv_rel: Path = Path("data/derived-data/nta_income_households_2024.csv"),
    nta_code_col: str = "nta2020",
    income_col: str = "median_income_proxy",
    out_html_rel: Path = Path("figures/map1_income_basemap_fixedscale.html"),
    tiles: str = "CartoDB positron",
    zoom_start: int = 10,
    FIX_MIN: int = 40000,
    FIX_MAX: int = 200000,
    TICK_STEP: int = 20000,
    legend_box_width: int = 420,
    legend_title_size: int = 14,
    legend_tick_size: int = 10,
    legend_bar_height: int = 12,
    legend_top_offset_px: int = 20,
    legend_right_offset_px: int = 20,
) -> folium.Map:
    repo_root = (repo_root or find_repo_root()).resolve()
    nta_shp = repo_root / nta_shp_rel
    income_csv = repo_root / income_csv_rel

    if not nta_shp.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing NTA shapefile: {nta_shp}")
    if not income_csv.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing income CSV: {income_csv}")

    # ----- load -----
    nta = gpd.read_file(nta_shp)
    inc = pd.read_csv(income_csv)

    # ----- clean keys -----
    if nta_code_col not in nta.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"'{nta_code_col}' not found in shapefile columns: {list(nta.columns)}")
    if "nta" not in inc.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"'nta' not found in income CSV columns: {list(inc.columns)}")
    if income_col not in inc.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"'{income_col}' not found in income CSV columns: {list(inc.columns)}")

    nta["nta"] = nta[nta_code_col].astype(str).str.strip()
    inc["nta"] = inc["nta"].astype(str).str.strip()
    inc[income_col] = (
        inc[income_col]
        .astype(str)
        .str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
        .str.strip()
    )
    inc[income_col] = pd.to_numeric(inc[income_col], errors="coerce")

    gdf = nta.merge(inc[["nta", income_col]], on="nta", how="left").copy()
    gdf = gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)

    # ----- center + bounds -----
    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gdf.total_bounds
    center_lat = (miny + maxy) / 2
    center_lon = (minx + maxx) / 2

    m = folium.Map(
        location=[center_lat, center_lon],
        zoom_start=zoom_start,
        tiles=tiles,
        control_scale=True,
    )

    # add map title
    _add_map_title(
        m,
        title="NYC Income Map",
        subtitle="Median Household Income by NTA",
        top_offset_px=20,
    )

    # ----- fixed colormap -----
    vmin, vmax = float(FIX_MIN), float(FIX_MAX)
    cmap = _make_viridis_colormap(vmin, vmax)
    ticks = list(range(FIX_MIN, FIX_MAX + 1, TICK_STEP))

    def style_fn(feat):
        v = feat["properties"].get(income_col, None)
        if v is None or pd.isna(v):
            return {"fillColor": "#d9d9d9", "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.55}
        vv = float(v)
        vv = min(max(vv, vmin), vmax)
        return {"fillColor": cmap(vv), "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.78}

    # ----- NTA layer -----
    folium.GeoJson(
        data=gdf.__geo_interface__,
        name="NTA income",
        style_function=style_fn,
        tooltip=GeoJsonTooltip(
            fields=["nta", income_col],
            aliases=["NTA", "Median Household Income"],
            localize=True,
            sticky=False,
            labels=True,
        ),
    ).add_to(m)

    # ----- borough boundaries + labels -----
    boro_col = _guess_borough_col(gdf)
    if boro_col is not None:
        boro = gdf.dissolve(by=boro_col, as_index=False)[[boro_col, "geometry"]].copy()

        folium.GeoJson(
            data=boro.__geo_interface__,
            name="Borough boundaries",
            style_function=lambda _: {
                "fillOpacity": 0.0,
                "color": "#111111",
                "weight": 2.0,
                "interactive": False,
            },
        ).add_to(m)

        boro_centroids = boro.copy()
        boro_centroids["centroid"] = boro_centroids.geometry.centroid
        for _, row in boro_centroids.iterrows():
            name = str(row[boro_col])
            lat = float(row["centroid"].y)
            lon = float(row["centroid"].x)
            folium.Marker(
                location=[lat, lon],
                icon=folium.DivIcon(
                    html=f"""
                    <div style="
                        font-size:12px;
                        font-weight:800;
                        color:#111;
                        text-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
                    ">{name}</div>
                    """
                ),
            ).add_to(m)

    # ----- legend -----
    _add_fixed_legend_topright(
        m=m,
        cmap=cmap,
        ticks=ticks,
        caption="Median Household Income",
        box_width=legend_box_width,
        title_size=legend_title_size,
        tick_size=legend_tick_size,
        bar_height=legend_bar_height,
        top_offset_px=legend_top_offset_px,
        right_offset_px=legend_right_offset_px,
        control_pad_right_px=80,
    )

    folium.LayerControl(collapsed=True).add_to(m)
    m.fit_bounds([[miny, minx], [maxy, maxx]])

    outpath = repo_root / out_html_rel
    outpath.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    m.save(str(outpath))
    print("Saved:", outpath)
    print(f"Fixed scale: [{FIX_MIN:,}, {FIX_MAX:,}] step {TICK_STEP:,}")

    return m


# =========================
# Notebook / QMD usage
# =========================
m = make_nta_income_map_with_fixed_scale(
    out_html_rel=Path("figures/map1_income_basemap_fixedscale.html"),
    legend_box_width=420,
    legend_title_size=14,
    legend_tick_size=10,
    legend_bar_height=12,
    legend_top_offset_px=20,
    legend_right_offset_px=20,
)
m
```



```{python}
# =========================================================
# Map 2: NYC NTA Average Inspection Score
# =========================================================

# ===================
# Colormap helper
# ===================
def _make_reds_colormap(vmin: float, vmax: float):
    for candidate in ["Reds_09", "Reds_08", "Reds_07", "Reds_06", "Reds_05", "Reds"]:
        if hasattr(linear, candidate):
            return getattr(linear, candidate).scale(vmin, vmax)
    if hasattr(linear, "YlOrRd_09"):
        return linear.YlOrRd_09.scale(vmin, vmax)
    raise AttributeError(
        "Could not find a usable Reds colormap in branca.colormap.linear. "
        "Try upgrading branca: pip install -U branca"
    )


def _guess_avg_score_col(df: pd.DataFrame) -> str:
    cols = list(df.columns)
    cols_l = [c.lower() for c in cols]

    candidates = [
        "avg_inspection_score",
        "avg_score",
        "mean_score",
        "average_score",
        "inspection_score_avg",
        "inspection_score_mean",
        "mean_inspection_score",
        "score_avg",
        "score_mean",
    ]
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand in cols_l:
            return cols[cols_l.index(cand)]

    for c, cl in zip(cols, cols_l):
        if ("score" in cl) and (("avg" in cl) or ("mean" in cl) or ("average" in cl)):
            return c

    score_like = [c for c, cl in zip(cols, cols_l) if "score" in cl]
    if len(score_like) == 1:
        return score_like[0]

    raise ValueError(
        "[Inspection summary CSV] Could not infer the average score column.\n"
        f"Available columns: {cols}\n"
        "Fix: pass score_col='YOUR_COLUMN_NAME' into make_nta_foodrisk_map_with_fixed_scale()."
    )


# =================
# Map 2 function
# =================
def make_nta_foodrisk_map_with_fixed_scale(
    nta_shp: Path = RAW_NTA_SHP,
    score_csv: Path = SUMMARY_CSV,
    out_html: Path = OUTDIR / "map2_food_safety_risk_avgscore_fixedscale.html",
    nta_code_col: str = "nta2020",
    score_col: str | None = None,
    tiles: str = "CartoDB positron",
    zoom_start: int = 10,
    FIX_MIN: int = 10,
    FIX_MAX: int = 40,
    TICK_STEP: int = 10,
    legend_box_width: int = 420,
    legend_title_size: int = 14,
    legend_tick_size: int = 10,
    legend_bar_height: int = 12,
    legend_top_offset_px: int = 20,
    legend_right_offset_px: int = 20,
) -> folium.Map:
    ensure_exists(nta_shp, "NTA shapefile")
    ensure_exists(score_csv, "inspection summary CSV")

    # ----- load -----
    nta = gpd.read_file(nta_shp)
    sc = pd.read_csv(score_csv)

    # ----- validate columns -----
    ensure_cols(nta, [nta_code_col], "NTA shapefile")
    ensure_cols(sc, ["nta"], "Inspection summary CSV")

    # ----- choose score column -----
    if score_col is None:
        score_col = _guess_avg_score_col(sc)

    ensure_cols(sc, ["nta", score_col], "Inspection summary CSV (after choosing score_col)")

    # ----- clean keys & score -----
    nta = nta.copy()
    nta["nta"] = clean_key(nta[nta_code_col])

    sc = sc.copy()
    sc["nta"] = clean_key(sc["nta"])
    sc[score_col] = (
        sc[score_col]
        .astype(str)
        .str.replace(",", "", regex=False)
        .str.strip()
    )
    sc[score_col] = pd.to_numeric(sc[score_col], errors="coerce")

    # ----- merge + CRS -----
    gdf = nta.merge(sc[["nta", score_col]], on="nta", how="left").copy()
    gdf = gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)

    # ----- center + bounds -----
    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gdf.total_bounds
    center_lat = (miny + maxy) / 2
    center_lon = (minx + maxx) / 2

    m = folium.Map(
        location=[center_lat, center_lon],
        zoom_start=zoom_start,
        tiles=tiles,
        control_scale=True,
    )

    # add map title
    _add_map_title(
        m,
        title="NYC Inspection Score Map",
        subtitle="Average Inspection Score by NTA (Higher = Worse)",
        top_offset_px=20,
    )

    # ----- fixed colormap -----
    vmin, vmax = float(FIX_MIN), float(FIX_MAX)
    cmap = _make_reds_colormap(vmin, vmax)
    ticks = list(range(FIX_MIN, FIX_MAX + 1, TICK_STEP))

    def style_fn(feat):
        v = feat["properties"].get(score_col, None)
        if v is None or pd.isna(v):
            return {"fillColor": "#d9d9d9", "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.55}
        vv = float(v)
        vv = min(max(vv, vmin), vmax)
        return {"fillColor": cmap(vv), "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.78}

    # ----- NTA layer -----
    folium.GeoJson(
        data=gdf.__geo_interface__,
        name="NTA risk (avg score)",
        style_function=style_fn,
        tooltip=GeoJsonTooltip(
            fields=["nta", score_col],
            aliases=["NTA", "Avg Score (Higher = Worse)"],
            localize=True,
            sticky=False,
            labels=True,
        ),
    ).add_to(m)

    # ----- borough boundaries + labels -----
    boro_col = _guess_borough_col(gdf)
    if boro_col is not None:
        boro = gdf.dissolve(by=boro_col, as_index=False)[[boro_col, "geometry"]].copy()

        folium.GeoJson(
            data=boro.__geo_interface__,
            name="Borough boundaries",
            style_function=lambda _: {
                "fillOpacity": 0.0,
                "color": "#111111",
                "weight": 2.0,
                "interactive": False,
            },
        ).add_to(m)

        boro_centroids = boro.copy()
        boro_centroids["centroid"] = boro_centroids.geometry.centroid
        for _, row in boro_centroids.iterrows():
            name = str(row[boro_col])
            lat = float(row["centroid"].y)
            lon = float(row["centroid"].x)
            folium.Marker(
                location=[lat, lon],
                icon=folium.DivIcon(
                    html=f"""
                    <div style="
                        font-size:12px;
                        font-weight:800;
                        color:#111;
                        text-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
                    ">{name}</div>
                    """
                ),
            ).add_to(m)

    # ----- legend -----
    _add_fixed_legend_topright(
        m=m,
        cmap=cmap,
        ticks=ticks,
        caption="Avg Inspection Score (Higher = Worse)",
        box_width=legend_box_width,
        title_size=legend_title_size,
        tick_size=legend_tick_size,
        bar_height=legend_bar_height,
        top_offset_px=legend_top_offset_px,
        right_offset_px=legend_right_offset_px,
        control_pad_right_px=80,
    )

    folium.LayerControl(collapsed=True).add_to(m)
    m.fit_bounds([[miny, minx], [maxy, maxx]])

    out_html.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    m.save(str(out_html))
    print("Saved:", out_html)
    print(f"Using score column: {score_col}")
    print(f"Fixed scale: [{FIX_MIN:,}, {FIX_MAX:,}] step {TICK_STEP:,}")

    return m

# =========================
# Notebook / QMD usage
# =========================
m2 = make_nta_foodrisk_map_with_fixed_scale(
    out_html=OUTDIR / "map2_food_safety_risk_avgscore_fixedscale.html",
    legend_box_width=420,
    legend_title_size=14,
    legend_tick_size=10,
    legend_bar_height=12,
    legend_top_offset_px=20,
    legend_right_offset_px=20,
)
m2
```



```{python}
# ==================================================
# Map 3: NYC NTA Restaurant Inspection Intensity
# ==================================================

def _make_cividis_colormap(vmin: float, vmax: float):
    mpl_cmap = cm.get_cmap("cividis")
    colors = [mcolors.to_hex(mpl_cmap(i / 255.0)) for i in range(256)]
    return LinearColormap(colors=colors, vmin=vmin, vmax=vmax)


def make_nta_inspection_intensity_map_fixedscale_cividis(
    nta_shp: Path = RAW_NTA_SHP,
    summary_csv: Path = SUMMARY_CSV_YEAR,
    out_html: Path = OUTDIR / "map3_inspection_intensity_fixedscale.html",
    nta_code_col: str = "nta2020",
    n_inspections_col: str = "n_inspections",
    n_unique_restaurants_col: str = "n_unique_restaurants",
    tiles: str = "CartoDB positron",
    zoom_start: int = 10,
    FIX_MIN: float = 2.0,
    FIX_MAX: float = 6.0,
    TICK_STEP: float = 1.0,
    legend_box_width: int = 420,
    legend_title_size: int = 14,
    legend_tick_size: int = 10,
    legend_bar_height: int = 12,
    legend_top_offset_px: int = 20,
    legend_right_offset_px: int = 20,
) -> folium.Map:

    # ----- checks -----
    ensure_exists(nta_shp, "NTA shapefile")
    ensure_exists(summary_csv, "inspection summary CSV")

    # ----- load -----
    nta = gpd.read_file(nta_shp)
    summ = pd.read_csv(summary_csv)

    ensure_cols(nta, [nta_code_col], "NTA shapefile")
    ensure_cols(summ, ["nta", n_inspections_col, n_unique_restaurants_col], "summary CSV")

    # ----- clean keys -----
    nta = nta.copy()
    nta["nta"] = clean_key(nta[nta_code_col])

    summ = summ.copy()
    summ["nta"] = clean_key(summ["nta"])
    to_numeric_inplace(summ, [n_inspections_col, n_unique_restaurants_col])

    # ----- compute year-normalized intensity -----
    if "year" in summ.columns:
        summ["year"] = pd.to_numeric(summ["year"], errors="coerce")
        summ = summ.dropna(subset=["year"]).copy()

        summ["intensity_year"] = summ[n_inspections_col] / summ[n_unique_restaurants_col]
        summ.loc[summ[n_unique_restaurants_col] == 0, "intensity_year"] = np.nan
        summ["intensity_year"] = summ["intensity_year"].replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)

        def _wavg(g: pd.DataFrame) -> float:
            x = g["intensity_year"].to_numpy(dtype=float)
            w = g[n_unique_restaurants_col].to_numpy(dtype=float)
            mask = np.isfinite(x) & np.isfinite(w) & (w > 0)
            if mask.sum() == 0:
                return np.nan
            return float(np.average(x[mask], weights=w[mask]))

        totals = (
            summ.groupby("nta", as_index=False)
                .agg(
                    **{
                        n_inspections_col: (n_inspections_col, "sum"),
                        n_unique_restaurants_col: (n_unique_restaurants_col, "sum"),
                    }
                )
        )

        wavg_series = summ.groupby("nta", as_index=True).apply(_wavg)
        totals["inspection_intensity"] = totals["nta"].map(wavg_series)
        summ = totals

    else:
        summ["inspection_intensity"] = summ[n_inspections_col] / summ[n_unique_restaurants_col]
        summ.loc[summ[n_unique_restaurants_col] == 0, "inspection_intensity"] = np.nan
        summ["inspection_intensity"] = summ["inspection_intensity"].replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)

    # ----- merge + CRS -----
    gdf = nta.merge(
        summ[["nta", "inspection_intensity", n_inspections_col, n_unique_restaurants_col]],
        on="nta",
        how="left",
    ).copy()
    gdf = gdf.to_crs(epsg=4326)

    # ----- map base -----
    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gdf.total_bounds
    center_lat, center_lon = (miny + maxy) / 2, (minx + maxx) / 2

    m = folium.Map(
        location=[center_lat, center_lon],
        zoom_start=zoom_start,
        tiles=tiles,
        control_scale=True,
    )

    # Title
    _add_map_title(
        m,
        title="NYC Inspection Intensity Map",
        subtitle="Inspections per Restaurant per Year by NTA",
        top_offset_px=20,
    )

    # ----- fixed scale + CIVIDIS colormap -----
    vmin, vmax = float(FIX_MIN), float(FIX_MAX)
    cmap = _make_cividis_colormap(vmin, vmax)
    ticks = [int(x) for x in np.arange(vmin, vmax + 1e-9, TICK_STEP)]

    def style_fn(feat):
        v = feat["properties"].get("inspection_intensity", None)
        if v is None or pd.isna(v):
            return {"fillColor": "#d9d9d9", "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.55}
        vv = float(v)
        vv = min(max(vv, vmin), vmax)   # clip
        return {"fillColor": cmap(vv), "color": "#ffffff", "weight": 0.6, "fillOpacity": 0.82}

    # ----- add NTA layer -----
    folium.GeoJson(
        data=gdf.__geo_interface__,
        name="Inspection intensity",
        style_function=style_fn,
        tooltip=GeoJsonTooltip(
            fields=["nta", "inspection_intensity", n_inspections_col, n_unique_restaurants_col],
            aliases=["NTA", "Inspection Intensity", "Total Inspections", "Unique Restaurants"],
            localize=True,
            sticky=False,
            labels=True,
        ),
    ).add_to(m)

    # ----- borough boundaries + labels -----
    boro_col = _guess_borough_col(gdf)
    if boro_col is not None:
        boro = gdf.dissolve(by=boro_col, as_index=False)[[boro_col, "geometry"]].copy()

        folium.GeoJson(
            data=boro.__geo_interface__,
            name="Borough boundaries",
            style_function=lambda _: {
                "fillOpacity": 0.0,
                "color": "#111111",
                "weight": 2.0,
                "interactive": False,
            },
        ).add_to(m)

        boro_centroids = boro.copy()
        boro_centroids["centroid"] = boro_centroids.geometry.centroid

        for _, row in boro_centroids.iterrows():
            name = str(row[boro_col])
            lat = float(row["centroid"].y)
            lon = float(row["centroid"].x)
            folium.Marker(
                location=[lat, lon],
                icon=folium.DivIcon(
                    html=f"""
                    <div style="
                        font-size:12px;
                        font-weight:800;
                        color:#111;
                        text-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
                        white-space:nowrap;
                    ">{name}</div>
                    """
                ),
            ).add_to(m)

    # ----- legend -----
    _add_fixed_legend_topright(
        m=m,
        cmap=cmap,
        ticks=ticks,
        caption="Inspections / restaurant / year",
        box_width=legend_box_width,
        title_size=legend_title_size,
        tick_size=legend_tick_size,
        bar_height=legend_bar_height,
        top_offset_px=legend_top_offset_px,
        right_offset_px=legend_right_offset_px,
        control_pad_right_px=80,
    )

    folium.LayerControl(collapsed=True).add_to(m)
    m.fit_bounds([[miny, minx], [maxy, maxx]])

    # ----- save -----
    out_html.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    m.save(str(out_html))
    print("Saved:", out_html)
    print(f"Fixed scale: [{vmin:g}, {vmax:g}] step {TICK_STEP:g}")

    return m


# =========================
# Notebook / QMD usage
# =========================
m3 = make_nta_inspection_intensity_map_fixedscale_cividis(
    out_html=OUTDIR / "map3_inspection_intensity_fixedscale.html",
    legend_box_width=420,
    legend_title_size=14,
    legend_tick_size=10,
    legend_bar_height=12,
    legend_top_offset_px=20,
    legend_right_offset_px=20,
)
m3
```



```{python}
# ====================
# 4) Scatter Plots
# ====================

def save_chart_html(chart: alt.Chart, outdir: Path, filename: str) -> Path:
    """Save Altair chart as HTML (always). Return saved path."""
    outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    outpath = outdir / filename
    chart.save(str(outpath))
    print("[Saved]", outpath)
    return outpath

def _compute_slope(dd: pd.DataFrame, x: str, y: str) -> float:
    """OLS slope of y ~ x (with intercept)."""
    X = dd[x].to_numpy(dtype=float)
    Y = dd[y].to_numpy(dtype=float)
    slope = np.polyfit(X, Y, 1)[0]
    return float(slope)

def _beauty_config(chart: alt.Chart) -> alt.Chart:
    return (
        chart
        .configure_view(stroke=None)
        .configure_title(fontSize=18, font="Arial", anchor="middle", offset=10)
        .configure_axis(
            labelFont="Arial",
            titleFont="Arial",
            labelFontSize=12,
            titleFontSize=13,
            grid=True,
            gridOpacity=0.25,
            tickSize=5,
        )
    )

def _boxed_annotation(
    slope: float,
    width: int,
    height: int,
    pad_right: int = 6,
    pad_bottom: int = 6,
    box_h: int = 20,
    font_size: int = 11,
    pad_lr: int = 6,
    est_char_px: int = 6,
) -> alt.LayerChart:
    label = f"β̂ = {slope:.3f}"

    box_w = pad_lr * 2 + est_char_px * len(label)

    box_x = width - pad_right
    box_y = height - pad_bottom
    box_left = box_x - box_w
    box_top = box_y - box_h

    df_label = pd.DataFrame({"label": [label]})

    box = (
        alt.Chart(df_label)
        .mark_rect(
            cornerRadius=6,
            fill="white",
            stroke="#888888",
            strokeWidth=1,
            opacity=0.95,
        )
        .encode(
            x=alt.value(box_left),
            x2=alt.value(box_x),
            y=alt.value(box_top),
            y2=alt.value(box_y),
        )
    )

    text = (
        alt.Chart(df_label)
        .mark_text(
            align="right",
            baseline="middle",
            font="Arial",
            fontSize=font_size,
            fontWeight="bold",
        )
        .encode(
            x=alt.value(box_x - pad_lr),
            y=alt.value((box_top + box_y) / 2),
            text="label:N",
        )
    )

    return box + text

def scatter_with_fit_altair(
    d: pd.DataFrame,
    x: str,
    y: str,
    xlabel: str,
    ylabel: str,
    title: str,
    out_html: str,
    x_domain: tuple[float, float] | None = (10, 13),
    x_ticks: list[float] | None = [10, 11, 12, 13],
    width: int = 720,
    height: int = 440,
) -> alt.Chart:
    if x not in d.columns or y not in d.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"scatter_with_fit_altair needs columns: {x}, {y}")

    dd = d[[x, y]].copy()
    dd[x] = pd.to_numeric(dd[x], errors="coerce")
    dd[y] = pd.to_numeric(dd[y], errors="coerce")
    dd = dd[np.isfinite(dd[x]) & np.isfinite(dd[y])].copy()
    if len(dd) < 2:
        raise ValueError(f"Not enough valid rows to plot: {title}")

    slope = _compute_slope(dd, x, y)

    # x axis controls
    x_scale = alt.Scale() if x_domain is None else alt.Scale(domain=list(x_domain))
    x_axis = alt.Axis()
    if x_ticks is not None:
        x_axis = alt.Axis(values=x_ticks, format=".0f")

    base = alt.Chart(dd).properties(title=title, width=width, height=height)

    points = base.mark_circle(size=70, opacity=0.55).encode(
        x=alt.X(f"{x}:Q", title=xlabel, scale=x_scale, axis=x_axis),
        y=alt.Y(f"{y}:Q", title=ylabel),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip(f"{x}:Q", title=xlabel, format=",.3f"),
            alt.Tooltip(f"{y}:Q", title=ylabel, format=",.3f"),
        ],
    )

    line = (
        base
        .transform_regression(x, y)
        .mark_line(color="red", strokeWidth=3)
        .encode(
            x=alt.X(f"{x}:Q", scale=x_scale, axis=x_axis),
            y=alt.Y(f"{y}:Q"),
        )
    )

    annotation = _boxed_annotation(slope, width=width, height=height)

    chart = _beauty_config((points + line + annotation).interactive())
    save_chart_html(chart, OUTDIR, out_html)
    return chart

def scatter_with_fit_altair_simple(
    d: pd.DataFrame,
    x: str,
    y: str,
    xlabel: str,
    ylabel: str,
    title: str,
    out_html: str,
    width: int = 720,
    height: int = 440,
) -> alt.Chart:
    if x not in d.columns or y not in d.columns:
        raise ValueError(f"scatter_with_fit_altair_simple needs columns: {x}, {y}")

    dd = d[[x, y]].copy()
    dd[x] = pd.to_numeric(dd[x], errors="coerce")
    dd[y] = pd.to_numeric(dd[y], errors="coerce")
    dd = dd[np.isfinite(dd[x]) & np.isfinite(dd[y])].copy()
    if len(dd) < 2:
        raise ValueError(f"Not enough valid rows to plot: {title}")

    slope = _compute_slope(dd, x, y)

    base = alt.Chart(dd).properties(title=title, width=width, height=height)

    points = base.mark_circle(size=70, opacity=0.55).encode(
        x=alt.X(f"{x}:Q", title=xlabel),
        y=alt.Y(f"{y}:Q", title=ylabel),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip(f"{x}:Q", title=xlabel, format=",.3f"),
            alt.Tooltip(f"{y}:Q", title=ylabel, format=",.3f"),
        ],
    )

    line = (
        base
        .transform_regression(x, y)
        .mark_line(color="red", strokeWidth=3)
        .encode(
            x=alt.X(f"{x}:Q"),
            y=alt.Y(f"{y}:Q"),
        )
    )

    annotation = _boxed_annotation(slope, width=width, height=height)

    chart = _beauty_config((points + line + annotation).interactive())
    save_chart_html(chart, OUTDIR, out_html)
    return chart

# ----- Load data & build charts -----

df = pd.read_csv(SUMMARY_CSV).copy()
ensure_cols(
    df,
    ["nta", "median_income_proxy", "avg_score"],
    "summary CSV (static plots base)",
)
df["nta"] = clean_key(df["nta"])
to_numeric_inplace(df, ["median_income_proxy", "avg_score"])

dfy = pd.read_csv(SUMMARY_CSV_YEAR).copy()
ensure_cols(
    dfy,
    ["nta", "year", "n_inspections", "n_unique_restaurants"],
    "summary CSV by year (intensity)",
)
dfy["nta"] = clean_key(dfy["nta"])
dfy["year"] = pd.to_numeric(dfy["year"], errors="coerce")
to_numeric_inplace(dfy, ["n_inspections", "n_unique_restaurants"])
dfy = dfy.dropna(subset=["year"])

dfy["intensity_year"] = dfy["n_inspections"] / dfy["n_unique_restaurants"]
dfy.loc[dfy["n_unique_restaurants"] == 0, "intensity_year"] = np.nan
dfy["intensity_year"] = dfy["intensity_year"].replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)

def _wavg(g: pd.DataFrame) -> float:
    x = g["intensity_year"].to_numpy(dtype=float)
    w = g["n_unique_restaurants"].to_numpy(dtype=float)
    mask = np.isfinite(x) & np.isfinite(w) & (w > 0)
    if mask.sum() == 0:
        return np.nan
    return float(np.average(x[mask], weights=w[mask]))

intensity_annual = (
    dfy.groupby("nta", as_index=False)
    .apply(lambda g: pd.Series({"inspection_intensity": _wavg(g)}))
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

df = df.merge(intensity_annual, on="nta", how="left")

df = safe_log_income(df, "median_income_proxy")

# ---- Scatter plot 1 ----
chart_scatter_income_intensity = scatter_with_fit_altair(
    df,
    x="log_income",
    y="inspection_intensity",
    xlabel="Log Median Household Income",
    ylabel="Inspection Intensity (Inspections per Restaurants per Year)",
    title="Income and Inspection Intensity Across NYC NTAs",
    out_html="scatter_income_vs_intensity_annual.html",
    x_domain=(10, 13),
    x_ticks=[10, 11, 12, 13],
)

# ---- Scatter plot 2 ----
chart_scatter_income_score = scatter_with_fit_altair(
    df,
    x="log_income",
    y="avg_score",
    xlabel="Log Median Household Income",
    ylabel="Average Inspection Score (Higher = Worse)",
    title="Income and Food Safety Risk Measured by Average Score (NTA)",
    out_html="scatter_income_vs_score.html",
    x_domain=(10, 13),
    x_ticks=[10, 11, 12, 13],
)

# ---- Scatter plot 3 ----
chart_scatter_intensity_score = scatter_with_fit_altair_simple(
    df,
    x="inspection_intensity",
    y="avg_score",
    xlabel="Inspection Intensity (Inspections per Restaurants per Year)",
    ylabel="Average Inspection Score (Higher = Worse)",
    title="Inspection Intensity and Food Safety Risk Measured by Average Score (NTA)",
    out_html="scatter_intensity_vs_score_annual.html",
)

display(chart_scatter_income_intensity)
display(chart_scatter_income_score)
display(chart_scatter_intensity_score)
```



```{python}
# ====================================================
# 5) Stacked bar: income quintile vs inspection stage
# ====================================================

def extract_stage_raw(inspection_type: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    """Extract the part after '/' in INSPECTION TYPE, e.g. 'Initial Inspection'."""
    split = inspection_type.astype(str).str.split("/", n=1, expand=True)
    if split.shape[1] == 2:
        stage = split[1].str.strip()
        stage = stage.where(stage.notna() & (stage != ""), "Unknown")
        return stage
    return pd.Series(["Unknown"] * len(inspection_type), index=inspection_type.index)


def compress_stage(stage_raw: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    s = stage_raw.astype(str).str.strip()
    s_low = s.str.lower()
    is_initial = s_low.eq("initial inspection")
    is_re = s_low.isin(["re-inspection", "reinspection", "re inspection"])
    out = pd.Series("Other", index=s.index)
    out[is_initial] = "Initial Inspection"
    out[is_re] = "Re-inspection"
    return out


ensure_exists(INSP_PARQUET, "inspections parquet")
insp = pd.read_parquet(INSP_PARQUET).copy()

ensure_cols(insp, ["median_income_proxy", "INSPECTION TYPE"], "inspections parquet (stacked stage)")

insp["median_income_proxy"] = pd.to_numeric(insp["median_income_proxy"], errors="coerce")
insp = insp.dropna(subset=["median_income_proxy", "INSPECTION TYPE"])
insp = insp[insp["median_income_proxy"] > 0]

quintile_labels = ["Q1 (Lowest)", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5 (Highest)"]
insp["income_quintile"] = pd.qcut(
    insp["median_income_proxy"],
    5,
    labels=quintile_labels,
)

insp["inspection_stage_raw"] = extract_stage_raw(insp["INSPECTION TYPE"])
insp["inspection_stage"] = compress_stage(insp["inspection_stage_raw"])

stage_share = (
    insp.groupby(["income_quintile", "inspection_stage"], observed=True)
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="n")
)
stage_share["share"] = stage_share.groupby("income_quintile", observed=True)["n"].transform(lambda s: s / s.sum())

stage_order = ["Initial Inspection", "Re-inspection", "Other"]
rank_map = {"Initial Inspection": 1, "Re-inspection": 2, "Other": 0}

stage_share["stage_rank"] = stage_share["inspection_stage"].map(rank_map).astype(int)

label_stages = ["Initial Inspection", "Re-inspection"]
label_df = stage_share[stage_share["inspection_stage"].isin(label_stages)].copy()
label_df["share_pct_1d"] = (label_df["share"] * 100).round(1).map(lambda v: f"{v:.1f}%")
label_df["stage_rank"] = label_df["inspection_stage"].map(rank_map).astype(int)

# ----- chart -----
sort_quintiles = quintile_labels

base = alt.Chart(stage_share).properties(
    title=alt.TitleParams(
        text="Inspection Stage Shares by Income Quintile",
        anchor="middle",
        fontSize=18,
        offset=10,
    ),
    width=700,
    height=420,
)

x_enc = alt.X(
    "income_quintile:N",
    title="Income Quintile",
    sort=sort_quintiles,
    axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0),
)

stage_color_scale = alt.Scale(
    domain=stage_order,
    range=[
        "#9ecae1",
        "#2171b5",
        "#bdbdbd",
    ],
)

bars = base.mark_bar().encode(
    x=x_enc,
    y=alt.Y("share:Q", title="Share of Inspections", axis=alt.Axis(format="%")),
    color=alt.Color(
        "inspection_stage:N",
        title="Inspection Stage",
        sort=stage_order,
        scale=stage_color_scale,
        legend=alt.Legend(orient="right"),
    ),
    order=alt.Order("stage_rank:Q"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("income_quintile:N", title="Income Quintile"),
        alt.Tooltip("inspection_stage:N", title="Stage"),
        alt.Tooltip("n:Q", title="Count", format=",.0f"),
        alt.Tooltip("share:Q", title="Share", format=".2%"),
    ],
)

labels = alt.Chart(label_df).mark_text(
    color="white",
    font="Arial",
    fontSize=12,
    fontWeight="bold",
    dy=10,
).encode(
    x=x_enc,
    y=alt.Y("share:Q", stack="center"),
    text=alt.Text("share_pct_1d:N"),
    order=alt.Order("stage_rank:Q"),
)

chart_stage = (bars + labels).interactive()

save_chart_html(chart_stage, OUTDIR, "stacked_income_quintile_vs_stage.html")
chart_stage
```




```{python}
# =====================================================
# 6) Trend: slope of (intensity ~ log_income) by year
# =====================================================

def get_inspection_date(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    if "inspection_date" in df.columns:
        return pd.to_datetime(df["inspection_date"], errors="coerce")
    if "INSPECTION DATE" in df.columns:
        return pd.to_datetime(df["INSPECTION DATE"], errors="coerce")
    raise ValueError("Need 'inspection_date' or 'INSPECTION DATE' column.")


dfi = pd.read_parquet(INSP_PARQUET).copy()
dfi["inspection_date"] = get_inspection_date(dfi)

dfi = dfi[dfi["inspection_date"].notna()]
dfi = dfi[dfi["inspection_date"] != pd.Timestamp("1900-01-01")]
dfi["year"] = dfi["inspection_date"].dt.year

ensure_cols(dfi, ["nta", "CAMIS", "median_income_proxy"], "inspections parquet (trend slope)")
dfi["nta"] = clean_key(dfi["nta"])
dfi["median_income_proxy"] = pd.to_numeric(dfi["median_income_proxy"], errors="coerce")
dfi = dfi.dropna(subset=["nta", "CAMIS", "median_income_proxy"])
dfi = dfi[dfi["median_income_proxy"] > 0]
dfi["log_income"] = np.log(dfi["median_income_proxy"])

nta_year = (
    dfi.groupby(["year", "nta"], as_index=False)
    .agg(
        n_inspections=("CAMIS", "size"),
        n_unique_restaurants=("CAMIS", "nunique"),
        log_income=("log_income", "first"),
    )
)
nta_year["inspection_intensity"] = nta_year["n_inspections"] / nta_year["n_unique_restaurants"]
nta_year = nta_year[
    np.isfinite(nta_year["inspection_intensity"]) & np.isfinite(nta_year["log_income"])
].copy()

min_nta = 30
results = []
for year in sorted(nta_year["year"].unique()):
    sub = nta_year[nta_year["year"] == year]
    if len(sub) < min_nta:
        continue
    z = np.polyfit(sub["log_income"], sub["inspection_intensity"], 1)
    results.append({"year": int(year), "slope": float(z[0]), "n_nta": int(len(sub))})

slopes = pd.DataFrame(results)
if slopes.empty:
    raise ValueError("No year has enough NTA observations to estimate slopes.")

csvpath = OUTDIR / "trend_slope_intensity_on_income_by_year.csv"
slopes.to_csv(csvpath, index=False)
print("[Saved]", csvpath)

# ---- main line chart ----
chart_trend = (
    alt.Chart(slopes)
    .mark_line()
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("year:O", title="Year", axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)),
        y=alt.Y("slope:Q", title="Income and Inspection Intensity Relationship (Slope)"),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("year:O", title="Year"),
            alt.Tooltip("slope:Q", title="Slope", format=",.4f"),
            alt.Tooltip("n_nta:Q", title="N NTA", format=",.0f"),
        ],
    )
    .properties(
        title=alt.TitleParams(
            text="Yearly Slope of Inspection Intensity on Income (NTA-Level)",
            anchor="middle",
            fontSize=18,
            offset=10,
        ),
        width=700,
        height=420,
    )
)

# ---- points ----
points = (
    alt.Chart(slopes)
    .mark_circle(size=60)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("year:O", axis=alt.Axis(labelAngle=0)),
        y=alt.Y("slope:Q"),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("year:O", title="Year"),
            alt.Tooltip("slope:Q", title="Slope", format=",.4f"),
            alt.Tooltip("n_nta:Q", title="N NTA", format=",.0f"),
        ],
    )
)

# ---- 0 reference line ----
zero_line = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({"y": [0]})).mark_rule(
    color="red",
    strokeWidth=2,
    strokeDash=[6, 6],
).encode(
    y="y:Q"
)

chart_trend_final = (zero_line + chart_trend + points).interactive()

save_chart_html(chart_trend_final, OUTDIR, "trend_slope_intensity_on_income_by_year.html")
chart_trend_final
```
